history.qwen_observation: H2 2.x (transitively upgraded by Spring Boot 3.x) rejects legacy `INTEGER IDENTITY` syntax in schema.sql, causing all tests to fail during context initialization.
history.qwen_rationale: Pinning H2 back to 1.4.200 restores compatibility with the legacy `IDENTITY` syntax used in the project's SQL scripts, allowing the Spring context to load and tests to pass under Java 21.
